name: chaos-resilience-engineering
description: Chaos & resilience engineering team — 2 agents (resilience-architect owns WHY/WHAT: steady-state hypothesis, failure-mode & dependency analysis, blast-radius design, resilience SLOs/error budgets, and the GameDay program; chaos-experiment-engineer owns HOW/RUN: fault-injection tooling, experiment automation, safety/abort/rollback, staging→prod progression, and CI/CD continuous verification). Fluent in Chaos Mesh, LitmusChaos, AWS FIS, Gremlin, Steadybit, Azure Chaos Studio, Chaos Toolkit, and resilience patterns (timeouts, retries+jitter, circuit breakers, bulkheads, load shedding). 3 skills, a 2-doc knowledge bank (decision tree + 2026 patterns), and 2 templates. NO experiment runs against prod without a steady-state hypothesis, a blast-radius limit, and an abort/rollback condition. Distinct from observability-sre (detects failure / on-call), performance-engineering (throughput/latency), and qa-test-automation (functional correctness). Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
